headline: Valor Closes Series B Round of Capital Investment
summary: Valor, a Fort Worth-based specialty asset management company with expertise in providing mineral management solutions and oil and gas outsourcing, is pleased to announce the close of its Series B round of capital investment. This Series B round was led by Ladd Wilks, of Cisco; the Moncrief family, of Fort Worth; and the Lamb family, of Midland.
